  • Uses of ConfigurationChangeDetector in org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.commons.config.reload

    Subclasses of ConfigurationChangeDetector in org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.commons.config.reload
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PollingConfigMapChangeDetector
    A change detector that periodically retrieves configmaps and fire a reload when something changes.
    class 
    PollingSecretsChangeDetector
    A change detector that periodically retrieves secrets and fires a reload when something changes.

  • Uses of ConfigurationChangeDetector in org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.fabric8.config.reload

    Subclasses of ConfigurationChangeDetector in org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.fabric8.config.reload
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Fabric8EventBasedConfigMapChangeDetector
    An Event Based change detector that subscribes to changes in configMaps and fire a reload when something changes.
    class 
    Fabric8EventBasedSecretsChangeDetector
    An event based change detector that subscribes to changes in secrets and fire a reload when something changes.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    ConfigurationChangeDetector
